args.Description: "Send custom_color and custom_image_url payload values in handleSendMarketing api call"
args.Instruction: "Add custom_color and custom_image_url parameters inside api.sendAdminEmail request."
args.ReplacementContent:
"            const result = await api.sendAdminEmail({
                subject: marketingSubject,
                content: marketingContent,
                recipient_type: "selected",
                selected_user_ids: selectedMarketingUserIds,
                segment: selectedMarketingCard.segment,
                custom_color: marketingColor || undefined,
                custom_image_url: marketingImageUrl || undefined
            });"
args.TargetContent:
"            const result = await api.sendAdminEmail({
                subject: marketingSubject,
                content: marketingContent,
                recipient_type: "selected",
                selected_user_ids: selectedMarketingUserIds,
                segment: selectedMarketingCard.segment
            });"
args.toolAction: "Passing custom color and image variables to marketing email send client call"
